name: Naomi McKenna
seeking: Naomi McKenna is likely seeking established experts, course creators, and thought leaders in personal and business development who need a seasoned JV manager to run their affiliate and partner marketing campaigns. She is also well-positioned to connect complementary brands for cross-promotional launches and strategic alliance deals.
who_you_serve: Experts and leaders in the Personal and Business Development industries.
what_you_do: Naomi McKenna is a Partner Marketing Strategist specializing in Joint Venture and Affiliate Marketing management for experts and leaders in the Personal Development and Digital Marketing industries.
offering: Joint venture management, affiliate marketing strategy, and strategic partnership development.
bio: Naomi McKenna is a Partner Marketing Strategist with over 12 years of experience managing Joint Ventures for experts and leaders in the Personal and Business Development industries. She is the Owner and Founder of Impact Inspired, LLC, and serves as Partner & Director of Joint Venture Division at Michael Curtis Media in Austin, Texas. Past clients include Marisa Murgatroyd, John Assaraf, Roland Frasier, Lisa Sasevich, T. Harv Eker, and Agora Financial.
service_provided: JV opportunity maximization, partnership development, event strategy
business_focus: Naomi McKenna is a Partner Marketing Strategist specializing in Joint Venture and Affiliate Marketing management for experts and leaders in the Personal Development and Digital Marketing industries. (Joint Ventures)
